summary: Supporting install bundle for the public OpenUI repo across Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode-adaptable MCP hosts, and other stdio clients. It ships sample configs, install notes, proof guidance, and troubleshooting without claiming an official listing.
audience: builders who want the quickest honest install path for Codex or Claude Code
maintainers preparing repo-owned public distribution assets
integrators adapting the same stdio MCP contract for another local-first host

currentTruth.codex: Official MCP install docs exist and this repo now ships a repo-owned Codex install bundle for that path.
currentTruth.claudeCode: Official MCP install docs exist and this repo now ships a repo-owned Claude Code install bundle for that path.
currentTruth.genericMcpHost: A repo-owned stdio launch contract is included for other hosts that can spawn a local MCP server.

artifacts.role: repo-scoped marketplace sample for the official local Codex plugin directory
sample Claude Code MCP config contract
repo-owned Claude Code and OpenClaw-compatible plugin bundle
sample generic stdio MCP launch contract

installPath: Use examples/codex/marketplace.sample.json when you want a repo-scoped Codex plugin directory sample
Use .claude-plugin/marketplace.json when you want a marketplace-compatible Claude bundle entry
Build the repo so .runtime-cache/build/mcp-server/services/mcp-server/src/main.js exists before you add the MCP entry
notFor: claiming a Claude Code plugin listing
claiming a hosted builder or managed SaaS deployment
claiming per-host verification for every MCP-capable client
operatorOnlyTail: Any future official marketplace or vendor catalog submission
Any remote settings or platform approval required by a client host
Any public release publication or external storefront promotion
